title: ranunculus nephrodes
intro: Ranunculus nephrodes, also known as kidney vetch or lesser kidney vetch, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus nephrodes include its ability to support kidney function, reduce swelling, and alleviate urinary tract issues. Ranunculus nephrodes is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for kidney and urinary health.
